samples.xml_description:
<module id="serial2parallel">
    <description>Implement a series-parallel conversion circuit.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="din_serial">Serial input data.</input>
        <input id="din_valid">Validity signal for input data.</input>
        <output id="dout_parallel" width_description="[7:0]">Parallel output data.</output>
        <output id="dout_valid">Validity signal for the output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="cnt">Counter to count the number of input data.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="cnt" width_description="[3:0]">Counter to count the number of input data.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <case>
            <item>
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <item><signal>reset</signal></item>
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <sequential>
                        <item><assign><signal>cnt</signal> = <value>0</value></assign></item>
                        <item><assign><signal>dout_valid</signal> = <value>0</value></assign></item>
                    </sequential>
                </action>
            </item>
            <item>
                <condition>
                    <and>
                        <item><signal>reset</signal> is not active</item>
                        <item><signal>din_valid</signal> = <value>1</value></item>
                    </and>
                </condition>
                <action>
                    <sequential>
                        <item><assign><signal>cnt</signal> = <signal>cnt</signal> + <value>1</value></assign></item>
                        <item>
                            <assign>
                                <signal>dout_parallel</signal>[<signal>cnt</signal>] = <signal>din_serial</signal>
                            </assign>
                        </item>
                        <item>
                            <if>
                                <cond><signal>cnt</signal> == <value>3'b111</value></cond>
                                <true>
                                    <assign><signal>dout_valid</signal> = <value>1</value></assign>
                                </true>
                                <false>
                                    <assign><signal>dout_valid</signal> = <value>0</value></assign>
                                </false>
                            </if>
                        </item>
                    </sequential>
                </action>
            </item>
        </case>
    </implementation>
</module>
